meta.title: Product Orb Face — Competitive Intelligence
meta.usage: Hexagonal product orb face 2 — scroll chapter 03, corner anchor middle-left

composition_rules.notes: Radar metaphor without maps, geography, or brand logos

midground.notes: Frosted glass rings, slight low-angle depth
Small competitor signal points on rings, varied positions
Subtle backing panel framing the radar

background.notes: Faint ink grid lines only, not a map

render_prompt: Abstract competitive intelligence UI on warm ivory #F8F6F2. Centered frosted glass panel containing five concentric translucent indigo #4F46E5 radar rings viewed from a slight low angle, cinematic depth. Eight small coral #E85D4C pulse dots on the rings suggesting competitor signals. Very faint minimal dark ink #14141A grid lines in background, not a map, no geography. Premium product render, soft rim light indigo, subtle coral accents. Clean 10 percent margins. No text, no logos, no maps, no flags, no brand icons.
negative_prompt: world map, geography, country borders, text, logos, company names, globe, satellite imagery, military UI, dark mode, neon green radar
